name: Tangerine Curd
recipeInstructions:
This makes a delicious filling for cakes and tarts and can also be used as a spread for biscuits, scones or croissants.
Combine the juices, zest, sugar, and butter in a saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
Beat the yolks in a bowl until liquid. Gradually beat 1/4 of the boiling mixture into the yolks.
Return the remaining liquid to a boil over low heat. Gradually beat the yolk mixture into the boiling liquid.
Continue beating until it thickens slightly, about 2 minutes. Do not allow the curd to boil or it will scramble.
Pour into a clean bowl, cover the surface with plastic wrap, and chill.
Makes 1 cup
PETER KUMP - PRODIGY GUEST CHEFS COOKBOOK
